  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "When you say 'Clean this up,' do you mean a light copyedit (fixing grammar, splitting run-on sentences) or a more substantive edit (also improving paragraph structure and narrative flow)?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The general request to 'clean up' likely includes improving the paragraph-level ordering and narrative arc of the description.",
    "R1.6": "The artifact contains numerous run-on sentences and awkward phrasing, making sentence-level polish a load-bearing part of the 'clean up' request.",
    "RX.1": "The cleanup must preserve and clarify existing statements of uncertainty, such as the planner's occasional redundancy.",
    "RX.2": "The cleanup should ensure that claims, like the contribution of agentic decomposition, are not overstated relative to the evidence presented.",
    "RX.3": "The responsibility is to 'clean up' the provided text without introducing new information or altering the core technical description.",
    "RX.4": "The cleanup must ensure the system's performance and limitations are presented clearly to avoid misleading downstream researchers.",
    "RX.5": "All edits made during the cleanup must be traceable to the original text and the 'clean up' delegation."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: When you say 'Clean this up,' do you mean a light copyedit (fixing grammar, splitting run-on sentences) or a more substantive edit (also improving paragraph structure and narrative flow)?

rationale.R1.5: The general request to 'clean up' likely includes improving the paragraph-level ordering and narrative arc of the description.
rationale.R1.6: The artifact contains numerous run-on sentences and awkward phrasing, making sentence-level polish a load-bearing part of the 'clean up' request.
rationale.RX.1: The cleanup must preserve and clarify existing statements of uncertainty, such as the planner's occasional redundancy.
rationale.RX.2: The cleanup should ensure that claims, like the contribution of agentic decomposition, are not overstated relative to the evidence presented.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility is to 'clean up' the provided text without introducing new information or altering the core technical description.
rationale.RX.4: The cleanup must ensure the system's performance and limitations are presented clearly to avoid misleading downstream researchers.
rationale.RX.5: All edits made during the cleanup must be traceable to the original text and the 'clean up' delegation.
